message:
🌱 Add fluentd: Large message overflow logic incorrect mission (#1769)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "fluentd-1849-large-message-overflow-logic-incorrect",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "fluentd: Large message overflow logic incorrect",
+    "description": "Large message overflow logic incorrect. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current fluentd deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your fluentd version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n fluentd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluentd\nhelm list -n fluentd 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working fluentd installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review fluentd configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant fluentd configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n fluentd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluentd\nkubectl get configmap -n fluentd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=fluentd\n```\nCheck [CONTRIBUTING guideline](https://github.com/fluent/fluentd/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) first and here is the list to help us investigate the problem.\n\n- fluentd or td-agent version."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Large message overflow logic incorrect",
+        "description": "In the previous version, if BufferChunkOverflowError occurs,\nwhole data is not sent because of exception.\nIt is not appropriate because the problem exists only a partial split\ndata.\n\nIn this commit, detect BufferChunkOverflowError and postpone to raise\nit as an exception.\nSo a valid partial split is processed as intended.\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade fluentd to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade fluentd:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade fluentd fluentd/fluentd --namespace fluentd\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n fluentd\nhelm list -n fluentd\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n fluentd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluentd\nkubectl get events -n fluentd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Large message overflow logic incorrect\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "In the previous version, if BufferChunkOverflowError occurs,\nwhole data is not sent because of exception.\nIt is not appropriate because the problem exists only a partial split\ndata.\n\nIn this commit, detect BufferChunkOverflowError and postpone to raise\nit as an exception.\nSo a valid partial split is processed as intended.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "fluentd",
+      "graduated",
+      "observability",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "fluentd"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/fluent/fluentd/issues/1849",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/fluent/fluentd",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/fluent/fluentd/pull/3553"
+    },
+    "reactions": 1,
+    "comments": 11,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with fluentd installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-26T06:32:58.836Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
